resources:
DomainTrack Critical alerts Urgent notifications requiring immediate attention (expiring soon, check failures, etc.)." Reminder alerts Advance notifications about upcoming expirations and non-critical issues.

%1$s: %2$d alerts requiring attention

SSL Issuer Expiry INACTIVE Appearance Theme System Light Dark Auto OLED Dark Mode Uses true black for dark theme to save power on OLED/AMOLED displays Schedule Background Monitoring Enable Monitoring Automatically check domain and certificate expiration in the background Schedule Setting %1$s ~ %2$s %1$s ~ %2$s next day Next run: %s Not scheduled

Domain Certificate Domain not found. Please verify the name or remove it from monitoring. No SSL certificate found. This domain may not support HTTPS. Settings Domains Alerts Action Required Notice Search domains… Name Days Left Expiration Date Alert Rules Critical Alerts Domain Critical Alerts Domain Early Reminders SSL Critical Alerts SSL Early Reminders Alert Preferences Receive Notifications Get notified about domain and certificate expiration System Notification Settings Manage sound, vibration, and priority Alert Rules Configure critical and reminder thresholds Battery Optimization DomainTrack uses background tasks to check your domains once a day. Some device manufacturers implement aggressive battery saving that may block our background work. To ensure reliable monitoring, please disable battery optimization for DomainTrack. ✓ Battery optimization is already disabled for DomainTrack Manage in Settings Why is this needed? Some Android manufacturers (Xiaomi, Huawei, Samsung, etc.) add aggressive power saving that can stop background tasks from running. What does it do? Disabling battery optimization allows DomainTrack to run daily checks even when the app is not actively used. How to disable? Tap the button below and select «Unrestricted» or «Don\'t optimize» for DomainTrack in system settings. Optimization enabled Optimization disabled Domain Details Expiration date unknown Some domain registrars do not provide registration expiration dates. For such domains, expiration tracking is unavailable. Information not available Due to WHOIS protocol limitations, not all domain registrars are supported. If you encountered this issue, please report it to the developer. Report Issue Add Domain Edit Domain Enter domain to monitor example.com Domain name No domains yet Add a domain to track its certificate and expiration No results found Try a different search term or clear the search filter All clear! No upcoming expirations. We\'ll notify you when it\'s time. About Version Privacy Policy Read our privacy policy Rate App Support us with your review Source Code View project source code No internet connection available Background Monitoring DomainTrack can monitor your domains and certificates in the background and send you notifications about expirations. This feature is disabled by default. To enable it, go to Settings and turn on Background Monitoring and notifications if needed. Go to Settings Search domains No results for «%s»
